name: get_component_docs
description:
Get complete component documentation for `@heroui-pro/react` (Pro) or `@heroui/react` (OSS) components.
Accepts an array of component names from either package and returns the full MDX documentation for each.
Includes: anatomy, compound API, props, usage examples, styling info, and API reference.
Use list_components first to discover valid component names.
This is a unified MCP — you do NOT need a separate OSS MCP.
Workflow: list_components → get_component_docs → get_css (optional) → implement.

components.description: Array of component names from list_components. Accepts kebab-case names plus common import/display forms like TextArea, Textarea, TextField, and KPIGroup.
